summary: App with user authentication displaying Principal ID in profile section. Working on converting Principal ID to a deterministic 5-digit numeric representation.
architectural_notes: Principal ID is displayed in user profile section when logged in
A deterministic hash function will map Principal IDs to consistent 5-digit numbers (00001-99999)

existing_features.title: Create a deterministic utility function that maps any Principal ID string to a consistent 5-digit number (00001–99999) using a hash-based algorithm. The same Principal ID must always produce the same numeric output.

Update the UserProfileSection component (frontend/src/components/common/UserProfileSection.tsx) to display the 5-digit numeric representation of the Principal ID instead of the full Principal ID string. The copy-to-clipboard button should still copy the original full Principal ID.

new_feature_requests.summary: Convert Principal ID to a deterministic 5-digit numeric display (00001-99999) in user profile
